name: Suspicious SQLToolsPS Usage
description: Detects the suspicious use of `SQLToolsPS.exe` to execute PowerShell code. Attackers may abuse this tool to bypass application control and execute malicious commands. This rule looks for `SQLToolsPS.exe` process creations or parent processes, excluding legitimate SQL Server Management Studio usage.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created or involved (e.g., 'SQLToolsPS.exe').

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
